templates.name: haac-homepage-pod-delete
templates.description: Delete the Homepage pod in the management namespace to verify the operator dashboard recovers cleanly through the gateway.

templates.name: haac-ntfy-pod-delete
templates.description: Delete the Ntfy pod in the management namespace to validate notification-path recovery without touching the control plane.

templates.name: haac-radarr-pod-delete
templates.description: Delete the Radarr pod in the media namespace to validate media-helper recovery on persistent storage with low blast radius.
